hasAttributes.name: feedbackId
hasAttributes.description: FeedbackId

hasAttributes.name: rating
hasAttributes.description: Specifies how helpful the related record was.

hasAttributes.name: minRating
hasAttributes.description: Enter the minimum rating value.

hasAttributes.name: maxRating
hasAttributes.description: Enter the maximum rating value.

hasAttributes.name: normalizedRating
hasAttributes.description: Shows the rating scaled to a value between 0 and 1 based on minimum and maximum ratings.

hasAttributes.name: comments
hasAttributes.description: Type the feedback comments.

hasAttributes.name: source
hasAttributes.description: Shows where the feedback was submitted from.

hasAttributes.name: stateCode
hasAttributes.description: Shows whether the feedback is open, rejected or closed.

hasAttributes.name: statusCode
hasAttributes.description: Select the feedback's status.

hasAttributes.name: versionNumber
hasAttributes.description: Version number of the feedback.

hasAttributes.name: regardingObjectId
hasAttributes.description: Shows the record that the feedback is associated with.

hasAttributes.name: createdBy
hasAttributes.description: Shows who created the record.

hasAttributes.name: createdOn
hasAttributes.description: Shows the date and time when the record was created. The date and time are displayed in the time zone selected in Microsoft Dynamics 365 options.

hasAttributes.name: createdOnBehalfBy
hasAttributes.description: Shows who created the record on behalf of another user.

hasAttributes.name: modifiedBy
hasAttributes.description: Shows who last updated the record.

hasAttributes.name: modifiedOn
hasAttributes.description: Shows the date and time when the record was last updated. The date and time are displayed in the time zone selected in Microsoft Dynamics 365 options.

hasAttributes.name: modifiedOnBehalfBy
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the delegate user who modified the record.

hasAttributes.name: ownerId
hasAttributes.description: Owner Id

hasAttributes.name: ownerIdType
hasAttributes.description: The type of owner, either User or Team.

hasAttributes.name: owningBusinessUnit
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the business unit that owns the knowledge article views.

hasAttributes.name: owningUser
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the user who owns this feedback.

hasAttributes.name: owningTeam
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the team that owns the feedback.

hasAttributes.name: closedBy
hasAttributes.description: Shows who closed the record.

hasAttributes.name: closedOn
hasAttributes.description: Shows the date and time when the record was closed. The date and time are displayed in the time zone selected in Microsoft Dynamics 365 options.

hasAttributes.name: importSequenceNumber
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the data import or data migration that created this record.

hasAttributes.name: overriddenCreatedOn
hasAttributes.description: Date and time that the record was migrated.

hasAttributes.name: transactionCurrencyId
hasAttributes.description: Choose the local currency for the record to make sure budgets are reported in the correct currency.

hasAttributes.name: exchangeRate
hasAttributes.description: Shows the conversion rate of the record's currency. The exchange rate is used to convert all money fields in the record from the local currency to the system's default currency.

hasAttributes.name: title
hasAttributes.description: Type a title for the feedback.

hasAttributes.name: createdByContact
hasAttributes.description: Shows the contact who created the record.

hasAttributes.name: createdOnBehalfByContact
hasAttributes.description: Shows the contact who created the record on behalf of another user.

definitions.description: Container for feedback and ratings for knowledge articles.
